raw_rag.query: What unusual combination made Alice realize the Rabbit was extraordinary before she followed it?
What was written on the jar Alice picked up while falling?
Why did Alice avoid dropping the marmalade jar?
What two grand geographical words did Alice say while falling, even though she did not understand them?
Which two countries did Alice wonder about while imagining she might come out on the other side of the earth?
What pair of reversed questions did Alice drowsily repeat to herself about animals in the air?
What kind of table did Alice find in the hall before discovering the little key?
How high was the little door behind the curtain?
Before drinking from the bottle, what warning word did Alice look for on it?
What mixed flavor did the bottle taste like? Name at least two items.
After drinking, about how tall did Alice become when she thought she could fit through the little door?
What words were beautifully marked in currants on the cake?
When Alice grew enormously, what practical gift did she imagine sending to her own feet every Christmas?
What incorrect multiplication answer did Alice give for four times five while doubting who she was?
Which animal did Alice first try addressing in French with 'Où est ma chatte?'
What specific kind of dog did Alice describe while trying to talk to the Mouse?
Who proposed the Caucus-race as a way to get everyone dry?
According to the Dodo, who won the Caucus-race?
What item from Alice's pocket was ceremonially presented back to her as a prize?
What did Alice say the Mouse's sad tale looked like to her?
What mistaken name did the White Rabbit call Alice when sending her to fetch gloves and a fan?
What name was engraved on the brass plate at the Rabbit's house?
What did Pat say was in the window when the Rabbit asked him?
What did the Rabbit's helpers throw through the window that later changed form?
What did those pebbles turn into after landing on the floor?
Which creature did Alice identify as Bill when she kicked down the chimney intruder?
What large creature did Alice compare the puppy's play to when trying not to be run over?
What was the Caterpillar doing when Alice first saw it on the mushroom?
Which poem did the Caterpillar ask Alice to repeat?
How tall did Alice say was 'such a wretched height' when speaking to the Caterpillar?
According to the Caterpillar, what would one side of the mushroom do and what would the other side do?
Which bird insisted that Alice must be a serpent because of her long neck?
Who brought the invitation from the Queen to the Duchess's house?
What overwhelming ingredient filled the Duchess's kitchen air and soup?
Into what animal did the Duchess's baby finally turn?
What direction did the Cheshire Cat give for finding the Hatter and the March Hare?
How did the Cheshire Cat distinguish itself from a dog when arguing that it was mad?
expected: wag my tail when i'm angry

raw_rag.query: What was unusual about the March Hare's house roof and chimneys?
What drink did the March Hare offer even though none was actually on the table?
What impossible riddle did the Hatter ask Alice at the tea party?
expected: why is a raven like a writing-desk

raw_rag.query: What did the Hatter say was wrong with the watch after Alice answered the day of the month?
What did the Hatter blame for damaging the watch mechanism?
At the tea party, what time did the Hatter say it always was?
What three names did the Dormouse give for the sisters in its story?
What did the three sisters live on at the bottom of the well?
What strange M-words did the Dormouse list when describing what the sisters drew?
Why were the gardeners painting the roses red?
What were used as the balls and mallets in the Queen's croquet game?
What punishment did the White Rabbit say the Duchess faced, and for what reason?
What line from Alice caused the Queen to stop listening angrily during croquet?
expected: hardly worth while finishing the game

raw_rag.query: What three parties argued over how to remove the Cheshire Cat's headless head problem?
What did the Queen say a Mock Turtle was made from?
Why did the Mock Turtle say their schoolmaster was called Tortoise?
What were the first branches of arithmetic in the Mock Turtle's school?
What profession or creature taught Drawling, Stretching, and Fainting in Coils?
In the Lobster Quadrille, what happens immediately after the dancers change lobsters and retire in order?
What song did the Mock Turtle sing just before the trial began?
Who served as the judge at the trial, and what made the role look awkward?
What were the jurors writing down on their slates before the trial began, according to the Gryphon?
Who stole the tarts according to the accusation read aloud in court?
What three different dates were given for when the tea had begun?
